caption: A man wearing a tall, spiky silver wig, glasses, a white collared shirt, and a red bowtie sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments and a "LEE" logo. A logo for the "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man is seen smiling and talking, with his facial expressions shifting as he speaks. His head moves slightly from side to side while he maintains his seated position. The camera remains stationary, focusing on the man from the chest up as he engages in a conversation.
